chosen_action.title: Isolate momentum-watchdog tests from live workspace state

why_this_action.summary: The active loop was in a measurement-hold lane with Reddit fail-closed, so the strongest executable move was to repair a real runtime-quality regression: the new reddit_execution_status_latest.json signal was leaking into watchdog tests and making the gate depend on live workspace state instead of fixtures.
supporting_reasons: The highest-leverage external lanes were already blocked, saturated, or inside measurement windows.
A flaky truth gate would make future marketing repairs look green or red for the wrong reasons.
This repair improves the odds that the loop can safely keep redesigning itself during blocked-channel windows instead of stalling on ambient-state failures.

result.summary: Patched the watchdog tests so measurement-hold fixtures use a canonical marketing_*.json filename and the test patches ROOT alongside STATUS/SEO paths, preventing live log discovery from leaking into the suite. Re-ran the targeted unittest gate successfully.
result.expected_outcome: Future marketing loop repairs can trust this gate during measurement holds and Reddit-blocked periods without ambient workspace contamination.
result.measurement_window: Immediate; regression remains fixed unless future tests stop patching workspace discovery inputs.
result.replacement_condition_if_flat: If the loop keeps spending active slots on internal truth repairs without unlocking a new executable distribution lane, shift the next run to a different structural repair or a newly executable external lane rather than more test-only work.
